items.title: Claude Sonnet 5 is out
items.what: Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 5 — stronger long-run coding, tool use and debugging, at a lower price.
items.why: The models devs use daily keep getting better AND cheaper at the same time.
items.impact: Coding assistants get noticeably better at multi-step work. Worth retrying tasks that failed on older models.

items.title: Agent frameworks go to work
items.what: Major platforms shipped agent frameworks businesses can trust with narrow, well-defined jobs.
items.why: AI is moving from answering questions to COMPLETING work end-to-end.
items.impact: Devs who can orchestrate agents (tools, guardrails, retries) become more valuable than devs who just prompt.

items.title: AI catches brain bleeds in seconds
items.what: Hospitals report AI detecting life-threatening conditions like brain hemorrhages on scans before physicians can.
items.why: AI is now trusted in life-critical, regulated domains — not just chatbots.
items.impact: Expect more strict testing, audit trails and accountability questions in every AI job interview.
